column2: # Load library
library(geosphere)
# Make sure device_number is character in location table
CinC_locations <- CinC_locations %>%
mutate(device_number = as.character(device_number))
# Create all unique pairs
location_pairs <- expand.grid(device_number_1 = CinC_locations$device_number,
device_number_2 = CinC_locations$device_number,
stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# Join lat/lon for both devices
location_pairs <- location_pairs %>%
left_join(CinC_locations, by = c("device_number_1" = "device_number")) %>%
rename(lat1 = latitude, lon1 = longitude) %>%
left_join(CinC_locations, by = c("device_number_2" = "device_number")) %>%
rename(lat2 = latitude, lon2 = longitude)
# Calculate distance (in meters) using Haversine formula
location_pairs <- location_pairs %>%
mutate(distance_m = distHaversine(cbind(lon1, lat1), cbind(lon2, lat2)))
# Compute R² matrix
r2_values <- calculate_r2_matrix(CinC_wide[ , -1])  # exclude Date column

colnames(r2_values) <- c("device_number_1", "device_number_2", "r2")
# Join R² with distances
r2_distance_df <- left_join(location_pairs, r2_values, by = c("device_number_1", "device_number_2"))
# Keep only unique non-self comparisons
r2_distance_clean <- r2_distance_df %>%
filter(device_number_1 != device_number_2) %>%
distinct(device_number_1, device_number_2, .keep_all = TRUE)
# Preview
head(r2_distance_clean)
